examples: The baccalauréat exam season approaches, and with it ritual agonising over the standard of French spelling.
As a result, their choices are agonising.
The result is an agonising doubt in one's instinctive ability to mother.
The Bank of England's monetary-policy committee has been agonising for months over whether to raise them.
Defending champion Murphy has suffered some agonising final-frame defeats this season but came through this time.
